metadata.note: PYRD (dihydroorotate dehydrogenase) screen over Freedom Space 5 with Glide docking. property_constraints is the additive (generation-time) prefilter matching the internal SpaceHASTEN drug-like filter (MolWt<=500, cLogP in [-10,5], HBA<=10, HBD<=5, RotB<=10, FractionCsp3 in [0.10,0.80], TPSA<=140, aromatic rings in [1,5]); it is approximate and identical across KIF11/PYRD/TGFR1. Exact-structure exclusions used internally (fluorine<=1, amide<=2, and reactive-group SMARTS: nitro/aldehyde/acyl-chloride/thiol/enone/vinyl-sulfone/acrylonitrile/nitro-alkene/N-oxide) are NOT additive and are left to your scoring/curation step. hit_threshold -12.5 is the internal GlideScore hit cutoff (minimize) for PYRD; it is reporting-only (drives the 'hits' count and analog_harvest readiness) and does not steer the search. Thresholds were calibrated on Glide HTVS/OPLS_2005; Epik-ON scores sit ~2 kcal less negative, so treat it as a relative marker on your own grid. budget/batch_size are overridden by examples/run_navigator.sh (default 100k over 10 iterations).
